user.title: Import P44 physical sensor
user.description:
Configure a sensor entity that receives its value from a physical device registered on plan44 (e.g. EnOcean D2-14-41). plan44 will push sensor readings to Home Assistant automatically.

The **tag** is the plan44 device identifier (e.g. `enoceanaddress:00123456`). The **index** selects which sensor channel to use (0 = first channel).

Hint: when plan44 pushes data for an unconfigured tag, a Home Assistant notification shows you the tag and index.

error.p44_tag_required: A plan44 device tag is required.
